text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I arrive at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Keep going! Start like you mean to go
on—without ever giving an inch!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Haaaaah...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Goody-good job! That last stretch was super
rough, huh?
choice_data_list:
Doing some partner running with an
underclassman?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yep! She's a funny one, y'know. She said she
wanted to make me her mentor, so I'm helping her
out!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm not a funny one! You just always look like
you're having sooo much fun when you're running!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
And you totally dominate races as a front runner!
Plus your form is incredible! And really cool!
Watching your races just really gets me in the
feels—you're awesome!

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
One day, I want to run in a turf G1 race as a front
runner, and win just like—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okey dokey! Sounds to me like you've got
enough energy to run another lap!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you're gonna do great in your next
scrimmage, then take me on in a G1, right?

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...Yes! I am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I hear that the Umamusume Ines
Fujin trained with is running in a scrimmage, so we
both head over to the track to watch.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Ngh... Gaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Come on...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The runner we're there to see gradually falls
further and further behind, and in the end... she
places ninth.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that was great. You really gave it your all
until the very end.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I-Ines... I... I...

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...!
Hey, wait—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin and I search for the younger
Umamusume. I think Ines may have noticed the
same thing I did.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the while that young runner was leading the
pack on that turf track, she had a pained look on
her face.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, there you are.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ines...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, so... you weren't exactly having fun being
out in front, huh?

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...!
How did you...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I can tell. My whole thing is being the
Umamusume who goes out onto the track to have
a blast, after all.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: So listen... it's okay for you to run the way you most enjoy. Just 'cause you look up to someone doesn't mean you have to be them.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But you... you even shared your front-running tips
with me! How could I...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't worry about it. That time we spent
training was fun for the both of us! It was a great
experience, right? That's good enough for me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm me, and you're you. And the only one who can
really enjoy the fun you have... is you, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ines...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time later, I hear that the very same
Umamusume won a dirt scrimmage as a late
surger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, after winning, she had a big grin on
her mud-covered face.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what kind of fun she'll find once she
makes her debut...
choice_data_list: What kind of fun would you like to find next?
What kind of fun would you like to find next?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? You're gonna throw it back to me? Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll stay a front runner, so I can run, run,
and run some more, and win a ton of G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Cause that's what's most fun for me.
choice_data_list: Then you've got my full support with that.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Yep. And I'm glad to have it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin and I gaze out at the track where the
other Umamusume are running. Then, after about
five minutes, we get started on our own training.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I want to have loads more fun like I'm having now!
My parents are both good to go, and my sisters
are chasing their dreams too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna burn brighter than even the sun up high, and have a blast while I'm at it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Shining brightly for everyone to see—tell me that
doesn't sound like a good time!
choice_data_list: Sounds like this sun's still raring to glow.
Sounds like this sun's still raring to glow.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Exactly! My fun's just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin takes off toward the track, as
passionate today as she's ever been.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna run in tons more G1 races, and pull
way, way, way far ahead of the pack! I'll leave
everything in the dust—even defeat itself!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep on running and running, holding on to
that lead for as long as I can! 'Cause that way...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I can savor every second of this miraculous
moment where your fun and my fun are one and
the same.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Right now, I'm just wishing that things could stay
this way—the way I like—forever.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Trainer...
choice_data_list: Let's keep aiming for victory together.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Yeah, let's win! Let's win way, way more races!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Let's win and win and win! I'm not gonna let this
fun dream ever come to an end!
